title: Stitched Kaiju Plush Guardian Character Poster AI
sourceTitle: Stitched Kaiju Plush Guardian Character Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Stylized guardian-creature poster centered on skinny teenage scavenger with cyan twin-tail hair and a tired, annoyed expression with a colossal stitched kaiju plush guardian looming protectively behind. Subject: skinny teenage scavenger with cyan twin-tail hair and a tired, annoyed expression stands in the foreground with a unique silhouette, wearing oversized geometric shirt, bandages, patched sleeves, and cyberpunk accessories; the character feels tired, scrappy, family-safe, and visually separate from the guardian creature. Scene: rainy city crosswalk at night with wet reflective pavement, neon-lit buildings, passing-car light streaks, and soft bokeh supports a simplified poster depth while the guardian fills the background like a living mountain, open mouth forming a dramatic dark backdrop behind the character. Composition: Foreground character small but distinct; huge non-humanoid plush kaiju behind with bulky asymmetrical body, mismatched horns, stitched seams, fabric patches, exposed stuffing, oversized claws, huge glowing yellow eyes, and broken stone-like teeth. Signature Elements: Protective patchwork kaiju plush, tired scavenger foreground figure, stitched repairs, bandages, fabric tears, oversized claws, glowing mismatched eyes, and specific poster mood variant with readable visual details. Style: Sketchy character poster art with rough fabric rendering, graphic anime-street energy, handmade plush-monster texture, expressive linework, and bold collectible toy-poster appeal. Color Palette: Electric cyan, neon pink, acid yellow, deep violet, flat turquoise sky, dark mouth shadow, glowing yellow eyes, and high-contrast patchwork accents. Lighting: Flat graphic poster lighting with strong color separation rather than cinematic realism; creature eyes and mouth shadow create the drama. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Stitched Kaiju Plush Guardian Character Poster Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Stylized guardian-creature poster centered on young desert courier with lime-green bob hair and a guarded side-eye expression with a colossal stitched kaiju plush guardian looming protectively behind. Subject: young desert courier with lime-green bob hair and a guarded side-eye expression stands in the foreground with a unique silhouette, wearing patched windbreaker, taped gloves, satchel straps, and scuffed kneepads; the character feels tired, scrappy, family-safe, and visually separate from the guardian creature. Scene: city crosswalk after light rain with neon signage, reflective asphalt, blurred pedestrians, and colorful building lights supports a simplified poster depth while the guardian fills the background like a living mountain, open mouth forming a dramatic dark backdrop behind the character. Composition: Foreground character small but distinct; huge non-humanoid plush kaiju behind with bulky asymmetrical body, mismatched horns, stitched seams, fabric patches, exposed stuffing, oversized claws, huge glowing yellow eyes, and broken stone-like teeth. Signature Elements: Protective patchwork kaiju plush, tired scavenger foreground figure, stitched repairs, bandages, fabric tears, oversized claws, glowing mismatched eyes, and specific poster mood variant with readable visual details. Style: Sketchy character poster art with rough fabric rendering, graphic anime-street energy, handmade plush-monster texture, expressive linework, and bold collectible toy-poster appeal. Color Palette: Electric cyan, neon pink, acid yellow, deep violet, flat turquoise sky, dark mouth shadow, glowing yellow eyes, and high-contrast patchwork accents. Lighting: Flat graphic poster lighting with strong color separation rather than cinematic realism; creature eyes and mouth shadow create the drama. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

Theme: Stylized guardian-creature poster centered on skinny teenage scavenger with cyan twin-tail hair and a tired, annoyed expression with a colossal stitched kaiju plush guardian looming protectively behind. Subject: skinny teenage scavenger with cyan twin-tail hair and a tired, annoyed expression stands in the foreground with a unique silhouette, wearing oversized geometric shirt, bandages, patched sleeves, and cyberpunk accessories; the character feels tired, scrappy, family-safe, and visually separate from the guardian creature. Scene: rainy city crosswalk at night with wet reflective pavement, neon-lit buildings, passing-car light streaks, and soft bokeh supports a simplified poster depth while the guardian fills the background like a living mountain, open mouth forming a dramatic dark backdrop behind the character. Composition: Foreground character small but distinct; huge non-humanoid plush kaiju behind with bulky asymmetrical body, mismatched horns, stitched seams, fabric patches, exposed stuffing, oversized claws, huge glowing yellow eyes, and broken stone-like teeth. Signature Elements: Protective patchwork kaiju plush, tired scavenger foreground figure, stitched repairs, bandages, fabric tears, oversized claws, glowing mismatched eyes, and specific poster mood variant with readable visual details. Style: Sketchy character poster art with rough fabric rendering, graphic anime-street energy, handmade plush-monster texture, expressive linework, and bold collectible toy-poster appeal. Color Palette: Electric cyan, neon pink, acid yellow, deep violet, flat turquoise sky, dark mouth shadow, glowing yellow eyes, and high-contrast patchwork accents. Lighting: Flat graphic poster lighting with strong color separation rather than cinematic realism; creature eyes and mouth shadow create the drama. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
promptTranslations.ru:
Используйте английский промпт ниже для генерации изображения; сохраняйте видимый текст, названия брендов, значения переменных и параметры на английском.

promptTranslations.pt:
Use o prompt em inglês abaixo para gerar a imagem; mantenha textos visíveis, nomes de marca, valores de variáveis e parâmetros em inglês.

promptTranslations.ja:
以下の英語画像生成プロンプトを使用してください。表示テキスト、ブランド名、変数値、パラメータは英語のまま保持します。

promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.
